author: codex-duplication-audit

patch.value: Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: jscpd found src/cli/commands/docs.ts and src/cli/commands/files.ts share large command bodies: imports and option setup, path/spec parsing, artifact normalization, dedupe/sort handling, add/remove/list flows, and rendering blocks. Representative clones include docs.ts:24-54 vs files.ts:34-64, docs.ts:61-88 vs files.ts:105-132, docs.ts:94-161 vs files.ts:138-205, docs.ts:213-243 vs files.ts:288-318, and docs.ts:319-354 vs files.ts:535-570. Existing pm-3eu2/pm-n2ts are closed feature work, and pm-why9 covers CLI parser blocks but not the linked-resource command twin implementation. Fix by extracting a typed linked-artifact command core parameterized by resource kind, metadata key, validation, and rendering labels.

files/docs command behavior is driven by one shared implementation with kind-specific adapters; duplicate parsing, add/remove/list, dedupe/sort, and render logic is removed from docs.ts/files.ts; existing files/docs unit and integration coverage passes; pnpm build passes.

message: Create duplicate-code finding after duplicate-check search

value.author: linked-resource-dedup-lane
value.text: Investigation plan from linked-resource-dedup-lane: zero-behavior-change extraction should introduce a shared linked artifact core, likely src/cli/commands/linked-artifacts.ts, used by runFiles and runDocs while leaving files discover in files.ts. Extract shared helpers for ensureScope/default project scope, structured path detection, parseAddEntries with kind-specific bare-path noun in the error message, parseAddGlobEntries, parseRemoveEntries, parseMigrateEntries/applyPathMigrations, expandAddGlobEntries, key/sort/dedupe with note trimming, validateLinkedPaths, buildLinkedPathAudit, and the common runLinkedArtifacts mutation/list flow parameterized by metadata key files|docs, op files_add|docs_add, result field files|docs, and optional appendStable ordering. Keep wrappers in files.ts/docs.ts exporting current option/result names. Risk points: docs currently always sorts and has no appendStable option, so do not accidentally add append-stable docs behavior; preserve exact error strings (bare file path vs bare doc path), implicit scope=project and explicit scope=global semantics, stdin token resolution, glob cwd/path normalization, remove-by-path matching regardless of scope, migration warning/count semantics, validation/audit payload names/order, changed=true for mutation attempts, metadata deletion when empty, author/message/force ownership flow, and search-cache invalidation behavior in register-mutation. Focused tests after refactor: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/files-docs-command.spec.ts; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts -t "keeps repeated files/docs add flows stable across subsequent commands"; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts -t "add-glob"; pnpm build. Scope estimate: medium, 1 new core module plus thin wrappers, no command/contract/docs changes expected.

value.author: linked-resource-dedup-agent
value.text: Approach (linked-resource-dedup-agent): Extracted typed shared core at src/cli/commands/linked-artifacts.ts. LinkedArtifact={path,scope,note?} (structurally identical to LinkedFile/LinkedDoc). Shared exported helpers: ensureScope, looksLikeStructuredPathEntry, parseAddEntries(raw,bareNoun), parseAddGlobEntries, parseRemoveEntries, parseMigrateEntries, applyPathMigrations, normalizeLinkedPath, expandAddGlobEntries, artifactKey, sortLinkedArtifacts, dedupeLinkedArtifacts (dedupe+note-trim), validateLinkedPaths, buildLinkedPathAudit, and runLinkedArtifacts list/mutate core. Core parameterized by LinkedArtifactKindConfig{metadataKey:files|docs, op:files_add|docs_add, bareNoun:file|doc, supportsAppendStable}. runDocs calls with supportsAppendStable=false (docs ALWAYS sorts; DocsCommandOptions deliberately omits appendStable). runFiles calls with supportsAppendStable=true. Both map result.artifacts to files/docs result field. files discover + discover-only helpers stay in files.ts and reuse shared dedupe/sort/normalize. Risk points preserved: kind-specific bare-path noun, docs always-sorts vs files append-stable, implicit scope=project/explicit global, stdin token resolution, glob cwd/path normalization, remove-by-path regardless of scope, migration warning+count, validation/audit payload field names+order, changed=true on mutation attempts, metadata key DELETED when empty, author/message/force flow unchanged, register-mutation search-cache invalidation untouched. vitest.config.ts: linked-artifacts.ts in BOTH include and exclude (create.ts/update.ts pattern, imports mutateItem).

value.author: linked-resource-dedup-agent
value.text: Final (linked-resource-dedup-agent): COMPLETE. Shared helpers extracted into src/cli/commands/linked-artifacts.ts (new): ensureScope, looksLikeStructuredPathEntry, parseAddEntries, parseAddGlobEntries, parseRemoveEntries, parseMigrateEntries, applyPathMigrations, normalizeLinkedPath, expandAddGlobEntries, artifactKey, sortLinkedArtifacts, dedupeLinkedArtifacts, validateLinkedPaths, buildLinkedPathAudit, runLinkedArtifacts. Files changed: NEW src/cli/commands/linked-artifacts.ts (419 LOC); src/cli/commands/files.ts 692->361 LOC (kept runFiles thin wrapper + runFilesDiscover + discover-only helpers); src/cli/commands/docs.ts 383->42 LOC (thin runDocs wrapper); vitest.config.ts (added linked-artifacts.ts to include AND exclude). Net LOC: 1075 (files+docs before) -> 822 (all three after) = ~253 LOC removed (~24%). Public surface unchanged: runFiles/FilesCommandOptions/FilesResult, runFilesDiscover/FilesDiscoverOptions/FilesDiscoverResult/FilesDiscoveryCandidate, runDocs/DocsCommandOptions/DocsResult all still exported with original field names. register-mutation.ts and mcp/server.ts untouched and compile. Tests: pnpm build PASS; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/files-docs-command.spec.ts PASS (19/19); -t 'keeps repeated files/docs add flows stable' PASS (1); -t 'add-glob' PASS (1); -t 'files' PASS (6); -t 'docs' PASS (3); linked-test-parsers.spec.ts PASS (38). Manual dist/cli.js verification: bare file path vs bare doc path error nouns distinct; docs always sorts; files append-stable preserves order; files default sorts; implicit scope=project; remove->empty deletes metadata key (changed=true,count=0); migrate rewrites path + migrations_applied=1; files discover dry-run/apply/validate/audit all correct. Zero behavior change confirmed.

patch.value: Deduplicated files/docs linked-resource command bodies into shared typed core src/cli/commands/linked-artifacts.ts parameterized by LinkedArtifactKindConfig (metadataKey/op/bareNoun/supportsAppendStable). Thin runFiles/runDocs wrappers preserve original option/result names; files discover stays in files.ts. ~253 LOC removed. Zero behavior change verified: kind-specific bare-path noun, docs always-sorts vs files append-stable, scope/stdin/glob/remove/migrate/validation/audit/metadata-deletion/author-flow all preserved. Build + files-docs unit (19) + named integration cases + files/docs integration (6/3) all pass.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Coordinator post-extraction fix: the linked-artifacts extraction changed runFiles/runDocs result key ORDER (artifacts destructured out and re-appended last gave [id,changed,count,files] instead of [id,files,changed,count]); caught by release-readiness-runtime.spec 'keeps runtime JSON output object key ordering deterministic'. Fixed with shared renameArtifactsResultKey() that re-keys artifacts to files/docs in place, preserving original key order and presence. Determinism test + files-docs-command.spec (19) green; zero behavior change restored.

patch.value: Extracted shared linked-resource command implementation for files/docs.
files/docs commands keep behavior while duplicated linked-resource code is removed.
Shared linked-artifact helpers are used by the command surfaces and focused/full gates passed.
